heading.en: Things are nouns — add -s for plural

body.en: Name things with nouns. Put a or the before them. Make most plurals by adding -s (dog -> dogs). With 600 thing words plus a/the and -s, you can name the world.
body.zh: 用名词指称事物，前面加 a 或 the。大多数复数加 -s（dog→dogs）。用 600 个“事物”词，加上 a/the 和 -s，就能命名整个世界。

gloss.en: the space between two lines that meet

words.example: The two lines make a sharp angle.

gloss.en: a small insect that lives in big groups

words.example: An ant is very small.

gloss.en: a round red or green fruit

words.example: I eat an apple every day.

gloss.en: a curved part over a door or bridge

words.example: We walked under the stone arch.

gloss.en: the long part of the body from shoulder to hand

words.example: He has a broken arm.

gloss.en: a large group of soldiers

words.example: The army marched into the town.

gloss.en: a very young child

words.example: The baby is crying.

gloss.en: a soft container to carry things in

words.example: She put the food in a bag.

gloss.en: a round thing used in games

words.example: The boy kicks the ball.

gloss.en: a small group of people who play music

words.example: The band played a song.

gloss.en: a round bowl for holding water

words.example: She washed her hands in the basin.

gloss.en: a container made of thin material for carrying things

words.example: I put the apples in the basket.

gloss.en: a long container you fill with water to wash in

words.example: The baby is in the bath.

gloss.en: a thing you sleep on

words.example: I sleep in my bed.

gloss.en: a flying insect that makes honey

words.example: A bee flew to the flower.

gloss.en: a metal thing that makes a ringing sound

words.example: The bell rang loudly.

gloss.en: a small soft round fruit

words.example: The bird ate a red berry.

gloss.en: an animal with feathers and wings that can fly

words.example: A bird is in the tree.

gloss.en: the flat sharp part of a knife

words.example: The knife has a sharp blade.

gloss.en: a long flat piece of wood

words.example: The floor was made of wood boards.

gloss.en: a small thing that travels on water

words.example: We went on the lake in a boat.

gloss.en: a hard white part inside the body

words.example: The dog has a bone.

gloss.en: pages with words inside a cover to read

words.example: I am reading a good book.

gloss.en: a strong shoe that covers the foot and ankle

words.example: She put on her left boot.

gloss.en: a tall container for liquids

words.example: I drink water from a bottle.

gloss.en: a square container with sides and a lid

words.example: Put the toys in the box.

gloss.en: a young male child

words.example: The boy is playing.

gloss.en: the part inside the head that thinks

words.example: The brain helps us think.

gloss.en: the part that makes a car or bike stop

words.example: He pushed the brake to stop.

gloss.en: a part of a tree that grows out from the trunk

words.example: A bird sat on the branch.

gloss.en: a hard block used to build walls

words.example: The wall is made of brick.

gloss.en: a thing built over a river so you can cross

words.example: We walked over the bridge.

gloss.en: a tool with stiff hairs for cleaning or painting

words.example: She paints with a brush.

gloss.en: a round container with a handle for water

words.example: He filled the bucket with water.

gloss.en: the round glass part that gives light

words.example: The light bulb is bright.

gloss.en: a small round thing that holds clothes together

words.example: He did up the top button.

gloss.en: a sweet food baked in an oven

words.example: I ate a piece of cake.

gloss.en: a thing used to take photos

words.example: She took a photo with her camera.

gloss.en: a small piece of thick paper

words.example: I sent her a birthday card.

gloss.en: a thing with wheels to carry things

words.example: He pushed the cart to the door.

gloss.en: a part of a train that carries people

words.example: We sat in the front carriage.

gloss.en: a small animal with soft fur kept as a pet

words.example: The cat is sleeping.

gloss.en: metal rings joined together in a line

words.example: She wears a gold chain.

gloss.en: a food made from milk

words.example: I like cheese on my bread.

gloss.en: the front part of the body below the neck

words.example: He has a pain in his chest.

gloss.en: the part of the face below the mouth

words.example: He has a small chin.

gloss.en: a building where Christians go to pray

words.example: They go to church on Sunday.

gloss.en: a round flat shape

words.example: Draw a circle on the paper.

gloss.en: a thing on a wall that shows the time

words.example: The clock shows three o'clock.

gloss.en: a white or grey mass in the sky

words.example: There is one cloud in the sky.

gloss.en: warm clothing you wear over other clothes

words.example: Put on your coat, it is cold.

gloss.en: the part of a shirt that goes round the neck

words.example: His shirt collar was white.

gloss.en: a flat tool with teeth for the hair

words.example: She uses a comb on her hair.

gloss.en: thick string or thin rope

words.example: He tied the box with a cord.

gloss.en: a big farm animal that gives milk

words.example: The cow eats grass.

gloss.en: a small container with a handle for drinking

words.example: I drink tea from a cup.

gloss.en: cloth that hangs over a window

words.example: She closed the curtain at night.

gloss.en: a soft bag you sit or lean on

words.example: He sat on a soft cushion.

gloss.en: an animal with four legs often kept as a pet

words.example: I took the dog for a walk.

gloss.en: the thing you open to go in or out of a room

words.example: Please open the door.

gloss.en: a pipe that carries dirty water away

words.example: The water ran into the drain.

gloss.en: a box part of a desk that slides in and out

words.example: She put the keys in the drawer.

gloss.en: a piece of clothing worn by women and girls

words.example: She is wearing a red dress.

gloss.en: a tiny round amount of liquid

words.example: A drop of rain fell on me.

gloss.en: the part of the body you hear with

words.example: He has a pain in his ear.

gloss.en: an oval thing a bird lays, often eaten as food

words.example: I had an egg for breakfast.

gloss.en: the part of a car that makes it move

words.example: The car engine is very loud.

gloss.en: the part of the body you see with

words.example: She has one blue eye.

gloss.en: the front of the head with eyes, nose and mouth

words.example: She washed her face.

gloss.en: land where people grow food and keep animals

words.example: The cows live on the farm.

gloss.en: one of the soft light parts that cover a bird

words.example: A soft feather fell from the bird.

gloss.en: one of the long thin parts of the hand

words.example: She cut her finger.

gloss.en: an animal that lives and swims in water

words.example: A fish swims in the water.

gloss.en: a piece of cloth with a design for a country

words.example: The flag waved in the wind.

gloss.en: the part of a room you walk on

words.example: The ball is on the floor.

gloss.en: a small flying insect with two wings

words.example: A fly is on the window.

gloss.en: the part of the body you stand on

words.example: My left foot hurts.

gloss.en: a tool with sharp points for eating food

words.example: I eat with a fork.

gloss.en: a bird kept for its meat or eggs, like a hen

words.example: The fowl walked in the yard.

gloss.en: a border that holds a picture or window

words.example: The photo is in a frame.

gloss.en: land by a house where plants grow

words.example: Flowers grow in the garden.

gloss.en: a young female child

words.example: The girl is reading a book.

gloss.en: clothing for the hand with parts for each finger

words.example: He lost one glove.

gloss.en: a farm animal with horns that gives milk

words.example: The goat is eating grass.

gloss.en: a weapon that fires bullets

words.example: He never used a gun.

gloss.en: the fine threads that grow on the head

words.example: She has long dark hair.

gloss.en: a tool used to hit nails

words.example: He hit the nail with a hammer.

gloss.en: the part of the body at the end of the arm

words.example: He put a hand on her shoulder.

gloss.en: clothing you wear on your head

words.example: She wears a red hat.

gloss.en: the part of the body above the neck

words.example: He turned his head to look.

gloss.en: the part of the body that pumps blood

words.example: I can feel my heart beating.

gloss.en: a curved piece of metal to hang things on

words.example: He hung his coat on the hook.

gloss.en: a hard pointed part on some animals' heads

words.example: The cow has a long horn.

gloss.en: a large animal that people ride

words.example: She likes to ride a horse.

gloss.en: a place where ill people get care

words.example: He went to the hospital.

gloss.en: a building where a family lives

words.example: We live in a small house.

gloss.en: land with water all around it

words.example: They live on a small island.

gloss.en: a valuable stone like a diamond

words.example: The ring has a bright jewel.

gloss.en: a pot used to boil water

words.example: She put water in the kettle.

gloss.en: a small metal thing that opens a lock

words.example: I lost my house key.
